---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for Ariadne
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

(Who would use this and what are they trying to do?)

## Proposed approach

(Sketch of the API or implementation. A 5-line `import ariadne; ariadne.new_thing(...)`
snippet is ideal.)

## Cross-checks available

If this feature has a published reference (paper, GMAT example, JPL document) we can
validate against, please link it. Ariadne's credibility rests on every claim having an
independent cross-check.

## Honest scope

What this feature would NOT do. Limitations, edge cases, assumptions.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem; why this one is better (or simpler).
